2604.23195.title: AnalogRetriever: Learning Cross-Modal Representations for Analog Circuit Retrieval
2604.23195.paper_summary: Analog circuit design relies heavily on reusing existing intellectual property (IP), yet searching across heterogeneous representations such as SPICE netlists, schematics, and functional descriptions remains challenging. Existing methods are largely limited to exact matching within a single modality, failing to capture cross-modal semantic relationships. To bridge this gap, we present AnalogRetriever, a unified tri-modal retrieval framework for analog circuit search. We first build a high-quality dataset on top of Masala-CHAI through a two-stage repair pipeline that raises the netlist compile rate from 22\% to 100\%. Built on this foundation, AnalogRetriever encodes schematics and descriptions with a vision-language model and netlists with a port-aware relational graph convolutional network, mapping all three modalities into a shared embedding space via curriculum contrastive learning. Experiments show that AnalogRetriever achieves an average Recall@1 of 75.2\% across all six cross-modal retrieval directions, significantly outperforming existing baselines. When integrated into the AnalogCoder agentic framework as a retrieval-augmented generation module, it consistently improves functional pass rates and enables previously unsolved tasks to be completed. Our code and dataset will be released.
2604.23195.paper_summary_zh: 類比電路設計在很大程度上依賴於重用現有的智慧財產權 (IP)，然而在 SPICE 網絡列表、原理圖和功能描述等異質表示之間進行搜尋仍然具有挑戰性。現有的方法主要限於單一模態內的精確匹配，未能捕捉跨模態的語義關係。為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了 AnalogRetriever，一個統一的三模態檢索框架，用於類比電路搜尋。我們首先在 Masala-CHAI 的基礎上通過兩階段的修復流程構建了一個高質量的數據集，將網絡列表的編譯率從 22\% 提高到 100\%。基於這一基礎，AnalogRetriever 使用視覺-語言模型對原理圖和描述進行編碼，並使用端口感知的關係圖卷積網絡對網絡列表進行編碼，通過課程對比學習將所有三種模態映射到共享的嵌入空間。實驗表明，AnalogRetriever 在所有六個跨模態檢索方向上實現了 75.2\% 的平均 Recall@1，顯著超越現有基準。當作為檢索增強生成模塊整合到 AnalogCoder 代理框架中時，它持續提高功能通過率，並使以前未解決的任務得以完成。我們的代碼和數據集將會發布。
2604.23195.author: Yihan Wang et.al.
2604.23195.authors: Yihan Wang, Lei Li, Yao Lai, Jing Wang, Yan Lu
